hero.headline: When the power's out, *we're already on our way*
hero.subheadline: Hurricane Florence couldn't keep us down — and your electrical problems won't either. Licensed electricians who show up early.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From blown fuses to full rewires
services_section.subheading: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled by electricians who get it done fast

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.description: Power's out? Panel sparking? We pick up the phone and get there fast, even after hurricanes tear through town.

services.title: Meter & Service Panel Work
services.description: Replacing storm-damaged meters, upgrading panels, fixing breakers that won't hold. The heavy stuff done right.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.description: Junction boxes, flood lights, security lighting — inside and out. We'll even fix that broken one while we're at it.

services.title: Outlet & Wiring Services
services.description: New outlets where you need them, rewiring old circuits, fixing whatever the last guy messed up.

about.heading: Built for Wilmington's toughest electrical jobs
about.body: When Hurricane Florence hit and half the city lost power, we were the crew answering phones and getting people back online. Same hustle, every day — whether it's a blown breaker or a complete service panel replacement. Licensed, professional, and we show up when we say we will.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Wilmington says about our work

reviews.name: Elizabeth C.
reviews.text: Junction box and flood light install done perfectly. They showed up early and knocked it out fast and professional.

reviews.name: Patricia D.
reviews.text: After Hurricane Florence ripped our meter off, they found a replacement and had it installed in 2 hours. No price gouging either.

reviews.name: Alex A.
reviews.text: They've done multiple jobs at my workplace. Always quick response and amazing work every time.

reviews.name: Michael A.
reviews.text: TJ arrived early, diagnosed the problem fast, showed me the right way to do it, and had it fixed in minutes. True professional.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Cape Fear region
service_areas.subheading: Licensed electrical services throughout southeastern North Carolina

cta.heading: Power problems don't wait — neither do we
cta.body: Call now for fast, professional electrical service in Wilmington. Licensed electricians who show up early and get it done right.
